mapper.select:
SELECT ID, TO_CHAR(TRANSPORT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS TRANSPORT_DATE, DRIVER_NAME, COMPANY, LOADING_POINT, UNLOADING_POINT, CAR_MODEL, VEHICLE_NO, SUPPLY_PRICE, COMPANY_PRICE, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS CREATED_AT FROM CAR_TRANSPORT
AND TRANSPORT_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{dateFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRANSPORT_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{dateTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND DRIVER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{driverName} || '%'
AND COMPANY LIKE '%' || #{company} || '%'
ORDER BY TRANSPORT_DATE DESC, ID DESC

SELECT ID, TO_CHAR(TRANSPORT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS TRANSPORT_DATE, DRIVER_NAME, COMPANY, LOADING_POINT, UNLOADING_POINT, CAR_MODEL, VEHICLE_NO, SUPPLY_PRICE, COMPANY_PRICE, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS CREATED_AT FROM CAR_TRANSPORT WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CAR_TRANSPORT ( ID, TRANSPORT_DATE, DRIVER_NAME, COMPANY, LOADING_POINT, UNLOADING_POINT, CAR_MODEL, VEHICLE_NO, SUPPLY_PRICE, COMPANY_PRICE, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( CAR_TRANSPORT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, TO_DATE(#{transportDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{driverName}, #{company}, #{loadingPoint}, #{unloadingPoint}, #{carModel}, #{vehicleNo}, #{supplyPrice}, #{companyPrice}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE CAR_TRANSPORT SET TRANSPORT_DATE = TO_DATE(#{transportDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), DRIVER_NAME = #{driverName}, COMPANY = #{company}, LOADING_POINT = #{loadingPoint}, UNLOADING_POINT = #{unloadingPoint}, CAR_MODEL = #{carModel}, VEHICLE_NO = #{vehicleNo}, SUPPLY_PRICE = #{supplyPrice}, COMPANY_PRICE = #{companyPrice} WHERE ID = #{id}
